hero.title: Manage your business smarter with BillSutra
hero.description: Create invoices, track inventory, manage customers and payments, all in one powerful platform.

features.title: Everything you need
features.description: One workspace to handle invoices, inventory, and cash flow without juggling spreadsheets.

items.inventoryTrackingDescription: Track product stock and get low stock alerts
items.paymentTrackingDescription: Monitor pending payments and cash flow

pricing.title: Simple plans for growing teams
pricing.description: Talk to us for the plan that fits your business size.

cta.title: Start managing your business today
cta.description: Join thousands of small businesses using BillSutra to simplify billing and inventory.

footer.description: Business management built for small teams.

loginPage.title: Sign in to keep your business in motion.
loginPage.description: Track invoices, monitor stock, and oversee cash flow with a single dashboard tailored for teams.
loginPage.formDescription: Use your work email to continue to BillSutra.

registerPage.title: Create your billing workspace in minutes.
registerPage.description: Centralize customers, products, invoices, and payment follow-ups from day one.
registerPage.formDescription: Sign up with your work email to access the dashboard.

forgotPage.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPage.description: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.

resetPage.title: Reset your password
resetPage.description: Choose a strong password to keep your billing data protected.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Keep contact details and recent activity handy.
customers.lead: Keep billing contacts organized so follow-ups, invoices, and payment conversations stay easy to manage.
customers.addDescription: Capture billing details once and reuse them wherever you need.
customers.listDescription: Review contacts quickly and update details without leaving the page.
customers.saveError: Unable to save customer right now.

inventory.title: Warehouse Inventory
inventory.subtitle: All warehouse stock levels, grouped by location.
inventory.lead: All warehouse stock levels, grouped by location.
inventory.adjustDescription: Log stock movements for audits and corrections.
inventory.updateError: Unable to adjust inventory right now.

placeholders.quantityChange: Use negative values to remove stock

logoutModal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
logoutModal.description: This action will log you out.

dashboard.title: Welcome back, {name}.
dashboard.subtitle: A sharper view of sales, cash movement, profit trend, and inventory demand.

hero.operatingViewTitle: Revenue, receivables, supplier dues, and next actions in one operating view.
hero.operatingViewDescription: The dashboard now leads with what needs attention first, then steps through performance, forecasting, and records so the page is easier to scan on every screen size.

focus.title: Priority items
focus.description: Surface the tasks most likely to need action before you dive into the charts.

overview.title: Business pulse at a glance
overview.description: Primary KPIs are grouped together first so revenue, spend, collections, and payables can be compared without hunting through the page.

profit.title: How profitability is moving over time
profit.description: Profit cards are separated from operational balances to reduce cognitive load and make period-over-period changes easier to read.

performance.title: Revenue, cash, and payment mix
performance.description: Charts are grouped by financial story so users can move from booked activity to actual cash movement and then to payment behavior.

forecasting.title: Demand, inventory, and forward-looking signals
forecasting.description: Forecast widgets sit together with product demand and risk alerts so replenishment decisions can be made from one area.

operations.title: Alerts, billing health, and collection queue
operations.description: Action-oriented cards are grouped ahead of supporting insight panels so the dashboard helps users decide what to do next, not just what happened.

records.title: Transactions and recent invoice history
records.description: Dense data views are pushed toward the end of the page and paired with direct navigation, which keeps the main dashboard focused while still making detail accessible.

primaryMetrics.totalSalesDescription: Paid direct sales and invoice collections combined for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.totalSalesHelper: Direct sales exclude invoice-synced entries; invoice payments are merged with paid fallback handling to avoid duplicates.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesDescription: Spend committed to stock and supply purchases.
primaryMetrics.totalPurchasesHelper: Sum of purchase total_amount (fallback total) for the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsDescription: Outstanding customer payments still to collect.
primaryMetrics.pendingSalesPaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on sales in the selected range.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsDescription: Outstanding supplier payments for recorded purchases.
primaryMetrics.pendingPurchasePaymentsHelper: Sum of pending_amount on purchases in the selected range.

profitMetrics.todayDescription: Today's net after purchases and expenses.
profitMetrics.weeklyHelper: (Sales - purchases - expenses) over the last 7 days.
profitMetrics.monthlyDescription: Current month profit after all outflows.
profitMetrics.yearlyDescription: Year-to-date profit after purchases and expenses.

operations.invoiceStatisticsDescription: Keep invoice totals, pending items, and overdue follow-ups visible without opening the records page.
operations.collectionQueueDescription: The highest pending balances are surfaced first so collection work stays short and targeted.

records.recentInvoiceHistoryDescription: Recent invoices are sorted by date and trimmed to the latest five so the dashboard stays readable.

cashflow.title: Cash flow summary
cashflow.description: Current-month collections versus outgoing purchase payments and expenses.
cashflow.empty: No cash flow activity recorded for this period yet.
cashflow.footnote: Includes direct sale receipts, invoice collections, paid purchase amounts, and recorded expenses.

paymentMethods.sectionDescription: Breakdown of paid sales and purchases by payment type.
paymentMethods.salesEmpty: No recorded sale payments in this period.
paymentMethods.purchasesEmpty: No recorded purchase payments in this period.
paymentMethods.loadError: Unable to load payment method data.

salesChart.title: Sales and purchase analytics
salesChart.description: Compare booked sales against purchase activity to spot demand bursts and stocking pressure.
salesChart.balanceDescription: Monthly sales and purchase movement across the latest six months.
salesChart.categoryMixDescription: Top categories ranked by booked sales value.

profitForecast.title: Profit analytics
profitForecast.description: Revenue, operating cost, and net profit across the latest six-month window.

salesForecast.title: Sales forecast
salesForecast.description: Historical sales against projected movement for the selected period.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Jump into common billing, catalog, and purchasing flows without extra navigation.

notifications.title: Notifications & alerts
notifications.description: Review stock issues, unpaid invoices, and supplier reminders.

productSales.title: Product sales performance
productSales.description: Best-selling products ranked by units sold for the selected window.
productSales.empty: No products sold during this period.
productSales.topProducts: Showing top {count} products by units sold

customerInsights.title: Customer insights
customerInsights.description: Loyalty, churn risk, and visit cadence across your customer base.
customerInsights.topCustomersTitle: Top 5 customers by total purchase amount

supplierOverview.title: Supplier overview
supplierOverview.description: Purchase concentration, payables, and top supplier relationships.
supplierOverview.topSuppliersTitle: Top 5 suppliers by total purchase amount

activityTimeline.title: Activity timeline
activityTimeline.description: A quick stream of the latest recorded sales and purchases.

transactions.title: Recent transactions
transactions.description: Track the latest invoices and payment status at a glance.
transactions.empty: No transactions found for this range.

inventoryRisk.title: Inventory risk alerts
inventoryRisk.empty: No products at risk. Inventory levels are healthy.

invoice.pageSubtitle: Build GST-ready invoices with live totals, customer details, and preview-ready layouts for printing.
invoice.pdfError: Unable to generate PDF from preview
invoice.sendEmailMissingInvoice: Create and save the invoice first
invoice.sendEmailMissingCustomer: Customer email is missing on the saved invoice
invoice.gstNoteBody: Choose CGST + SGST for intra-state invoices and IGST for inter-state billing. Use "No GST" for exempt invoices.

invoiceForm.syncSalesDescription: Creates a sales record and deducts stock from inventory.

invoiceDrafts.title: Draft
invoiceDrafts.saveHelp: Save a draft to continue later without submitting the invoice.

validation.invoiceSelectWarehouse: Select a warehouse to sync inventory.
validation.invoiceTaxPositive: Tax rate must be 0 or higher.
validation.invoiceEachLineItem: Select a product for each line item.
validation.invoiceWarehouseSync: Choose a warehouse when syncing inventory.
validation.invoiceQuantitySummary: Ensure quantities are valid numbers greater than 0.
validation.invoicePriceSummary: Enter a valid price for each item.
validation.invoiceTaxSummary: Tax rates must be 0 or higher when provided.
